ksa_text: Knowledge of AI testing methodologies including adversarial testing, red-teaming, edge case construction, distributional shift testing, and structured failure mode analysis.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in testing and evaluating machine learning algorithms and/or AI solutions.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of automated security control testing tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of automated security control testing tools and techniques
Skill in testing and evaluating machine learning algorithms and/or AI solutions.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-K-004 (Risk Management/Knowledge) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.501, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.501). Risk Management is outside the Data Engineer role boundary at IC/senior IC level. Data engineers implement technical systems; they do not own risk management frameworks, strategies, or programs.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.501, and Risk Management (RM) handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk Management KSA for Data Engineer IC/senior IC roles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management competencies do not appear as Data Engineer requirements in IC/senior IC job postings. They are allocated to governance, compliance, risk, or leadership roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. Risk Management is not a Data Engineer core competency at IC/senior IC level. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: KSA RM-K-004 (Risk Management/Knowledge) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.501, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.501).
